---
name: Request an app
about: Ask for a new one-page app or category in the library.
title: "[App Request]: "
---

## What job should this app do?

Describe the real-world workflow or problem this app should solve.

## Proposed app name

What should this app be called?

## Suggested category

Which category should it live in? If you are not sure, suggest the closest match.

## Required inputs or configuration

List the fields, settings, API keys, or options the app must support.

## Expected output

Describe what the app should generate, display, or return.

## Deployment or integration needs

Describe any Cloudflare Worker, webhook, storage, or external API requirements.

## Privacy, compliance, or accessibility constraints

Call out any legal, consent, security, accessibility, or wording requirements.

## Example references

Share screenshots, links, rough mockups, or notes that would help shape the request.
